# MCP Server Card schema snapshot

This directory vendors `schema.json` and its Apache-2.0 license from the Model Context Protocol organisation's experimental Server Card extension at commit `3b2d974dbbc1bcf899e0ed2ef49a91758853c9a6`:

<https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/experimental-ext-server-card/tree/3b2d974dbbc1bcf899e0ed2ef49a91758853c9a6>

The extension is experimental and is not an accepted MCP extension. The production artifact verifier uses this pinned snapshot so schema changes require an explicit review and update here.

The reviewed `schema.json` SHA-256 digest is `2c772b51edb367f154771d84ddbae87ddba00a624422c8e46f218a9ac03bf042`.
